isolation.boundary: Local repo + local postgres (totus-db) only; no application code changes.

steps.action: Run targeted annotation API vitest cases for encrypted-at-rest and decrypted readback behavior
steps.expected: POST stores BYTEA ciphertext not equal to plaintext; API read surface returns decrypted original strings
steps.observed: Passed cases: "creates annotation and returns 201 with decrypted fields", "stores label and note as encrypted BYTEA (not plaintext)", and "returns annotations with decrypted fields sorted by occurred_at"

evidence.command: npm --prefix /Users/weae1504/Projects/totus/apps/web run test -- src/app/api/annotations/__tests__/route.test.ts -t 'creates annotation and returns 201 with decrypted fields|stores label and note as encrypted BYTEA (not plaintext)|returns annotations with decrypted fields sorted by occurred_at' --reporter=verbose

assertions.title: Baseline values encrypted at rest

steps.action: Run targeted baselines-refresh vitest cases tied to VAL-DB-002/VAL-JOBS-003
steps.expected: Direct evidence that raw metric_baselines.value_encrypted is non-JSON until decrypted, then payload has finite BaselinePayload fields
steps.observed: Passed cases verify encryption call-path and BaselinePayload shape in mocked flow ("encrypts BaselinePayload with user's DEK...", "encrypted payload conforms to BaselinePayload interface")

steps.action: Search test coverage for raw metric_baselines ciphertext parse-failure assertion
steps.expected: At least one test reading metric_baselines.value_encrypted from DB and proving JSON.parse fails pre-decrypt
steps.observed: No direct test found for raw-column JSON.parse failure on metric_baselines; search hits are comments/mocked plaintext parsing

assertions.issues: Assertion-specific raw at-rest parse-failure evidence for metric_baselines.value_encrypted is not directly covered by existing targeted vitest cases.

steps.action: Run targeted dismiss endpoint vitest idempotency/row-count cases
steps.expected: Duplicate dismissal yields a single row and unchanged dismissed_at
steps.observed: Passed cases: "creates a row in dismissed_insights table", "idempotent: only one row exists after two calls", and "idempotent: dismissed_at unchanged after second call"

evidence.command: npm --prefix /Users/weae1504/Projects/totus/apps/web run test -- src/app/api/insights/__tests__/dismiss.test.ts -t 'creates a row in dismissed_insights table|idempotent: only one row exists after two calls|idempotent: dismissed_at unchanged after second call' --reporter=verbose

assertions.title: CASCADE deletion cleans up derived tables

steps.action: Search schema vitest coverage for cascade deletion checks involving metric_baselines, user_annotations, and dismissed_insights
steps.expected: Test showing row counts before/after deleting a user across all three derived tables
steps.observed: Current cascade tests in schema suite target provider_connections, health_data_daily, and share_grants; no direct cascade row-count test found for the three dashboard-derived tables

assertions.issues: No assertion-scoped vitest case found that verifies cascade cleanup for metric_baselines + user_annotations + dismissed_insights after user deletion.

assertions.title: Job configuration — cron, concurrency, retries

steps.action: Run targeted baselines-refresh function configuration tests
steps.expected: Direct assertions for cron '30 */6 * * *', concurrency.limit=5, retries=3
steps.observed: Passed configuration tests only confirm exports/registration (baselinesRefresh defined, baselinesRefreshUser defined, exports index, route registration)

steps.action: Search configuration test file for explicit cron/concurrency/retries value assertions
steps.observed: Search returned only comment mentions for cron/concurrency/retries; no direct value assertion found

assertions.issues: Required config values are not directly asserted by targeted existing tests.

assertions.title: Batch processing of users with data-only filtering

steps.action: Run targeted baselines-refresh batch/data-filter/race-condition vitest cases
steps.expected: Batch size 50 behavior, users-with-data filtering, and race-condition empty-result handling are validated
steps.observed: Passed cases: "processAllUsers processes users in batches of 50", "excludes users with zero health_data_daily rows (query-level filter)", and "handles empty baseline results gracefully (no error, zero rows)"

assertions.title: Baselines encrypted with per-user DEK before storage

steps.action: Run targeted baselines-refresh encryption vitest case
steps.expected: Encryption invoked per metric with user DEK and writes performed per metric row
steps.observed: Passed case: "encrypts BaselinePayload with user's DEK and stores in metric_baselines" (test verifies per-metric encrypt calls and per-metric insert calls)

frictions.description: Several assigned assertions (VAL-DB-002, VAL-DB-004, VAL-JOBS-001) lack direct assertion-scoped checks in current targeted vitest surface, requiring coverage-gap verification via test search logs.
frictions.resolution: Captured targeted coverage-search evidence and marked those assertions blocked rather than inferring pass/fail.

blockers.description: No direct targeted vitest case found for raw metric_baselines.value_encrypted parse-failure-before-decrypt requirement.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran targeted baselines-refresh tests and repository test-coverage searches; found only mocked call-path/payload-shape checks.

blockers.description: No direct targeted vitest case found for cascade cleanup across metric_baselines, user_annotations, and dismissed_insights after deleting a user.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched schema test cascade coverage; only provider_connections, health_data_daily, and share_grants cascade assertions are present.

blockers.description: Function configuration tests do not assert cron/concurrency/retries values required by VAL-JOBS-001.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran function-configuration targeted tests and searched for explicit value checks; found only export/registration checks and comments.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions via targeted vitest runs: 4 passed (VAL-DB-001, VAL-DB-003, VAL-JOBS-002, VAL-JOBS-003), 0 failed, 3 blocked (VAL-DB-002, VAL-DB-004, VAL-JOBS-001). All targeted commands exited 0.
